_.$description: Skeleton placeholder base background color (the resting/non-highlighted gradient stops of the shimmer).

shimmer.$description: Skeleton placeholder animated shimmer/highlight color (the moving bright gradient stop).

background.$description: Fullscreen skeleton loader backdrop/overlay background color.

radius.$description: Fullscreen skeleton progress bar (track and fill) border radius.

_.$description: Fullscreen skeleton progress bar track background color.

active.$description: Fullscreen skeleton progress bar fill (completed progress) background color.

_.$description: Fullscreen generic spinner track (inactive) border color.

active.$description: Fullscreen generic spinner active (leading) segment border color.

width.$description: Table skeleton row divider border width.

border.$description: Table skeleton row divider border color.
